coverage_note: The bundled TP53 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from TP53 DNA damage checkpoint, p53 transcriptional control, apoptosis, cell-cycle arrest, and senescence and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000141510: TP53 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: TP53 findings should be read against DNA damage checkpoint, p53 transcriptional control, apoptosis, cell-cycle arrest, and senescence; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs1042522 (TP53 Arg72Pro) is curated as a TP53 marker for Cancer susceptibility and tumor-suppressor biology, DNA damage response and apoptosis; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

TP53 loss-of-function model is curated as a TP53 marker for Cancer susceptibility and tumor-suppressor biology, DNA damage response and apoptosis; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
